description: Vital Recorder 1.16.6 is open on the Windows desktop. A surgical vital signs recording file '0001.vital' from the VitalDB open dataset (Seoul National University Hospital) is located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\VitalRecorderData\0001.vital. This file contains approximately 3 hours of intraoperative monitoring data from a noncardiac surgery case, including arterial blood pressure (ART), ECG waveforms (ECG_II, ECG_V5), pulse oximetry (PLETH), capnography (CO2), airway pressure (AWP), and anesthetic agent concentrations (INSP_SEVO, EXP_SEVO). Load the file '0001.vital' from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\VitalRecorderData\ into Vital Recorder to display the physiological waveform traces.
